title: Support for board views on mobile - any updates?

posts.author: BraveCarto (Tomasz Kustrzynski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Follow up on Support for board views on mobile - #5 by Helen
Are there any news on implementing board views on mobile? (as opposed to item views)

Last update I have is from May '21: “Months would be a more accurate timeline. It’s still a bit far off.”

Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @BraveCarto!

I still do not have an ETA on this.

This is a request our team is aware of but I do not have a date for you for when it could be implemented at the moment.

Changes like this are usually posted on our apps changelog and API changelog so I would check them out once in a while

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
